After traveling 1,600 km and spending over 5,000 yuan, the seller found the customer’s photos misleading and showed the packaging was intact. The customer was arrested on administrative detention for fraud. Similar “only refund” scams have become common, draining merchants’ resources and disrupting e‑commerce.

title: How researchers are using GitHub Innovation Graph data to reveal the “digital complexity” of nations
content: Researchers used GitHub’s Innovation Graph data to compute a software‑based Economic Complexity Index (ECI), showing that digital development patterns predict GDP per capita, inequality, and emissions beyond traditional trade, patents, and research metrics. By clustering programming languages into 59 technology bundles and applying revealed comparative advantage, they found that countries specialize in related software stacks and that software ECI explains macro‑economic variation even after controlling for conventional measures. The study highlights software as a hidden driver of national economic complexity.

title: 以下是美国4月就业报告的主要要点
content: Key points from the U.S. April employment report: job growth slowed compared to March, with fewer new hires and higher wages. The unemployment rate rose slightly, reflecting a more cautious labor market. Employment gains were stronger in the private sector than the public sector, while construction and manufacturing lagged. The data suggest a gradual shift toward a “soft landing” for the economy, with policymakers likely to keep monetary policy tight.

title: Claude Code 效率翻 N 倍的技巧：用 Git WorkTree 并行开发
content: Using Git WorkTree, Claude Code developers can create separate working directories for each feature or bug fix. This allows multiple windows to run concurrently, enabling parallel development instead of fixed one‑by‑one tasks. After implementing this workflow, productivity increased noticeably, with developers able to address several issues simultaneously. The process is simple: add ‑‑worktree to the Claude command to spawn a new work directory. This method is recommended for users wanting to boost efficiency while using Claude Code.

title: AeonRiddles - 我开发的 LLM 驱动的解谜游戏
content: AeonRiddles is an LLM‑driven puzzle game by Silica Cat, building on earlier projects. It dynamically generates “Turtle Soup” riddles and a logic‑sniping challenge where players spot hidden logical flaws. Planned expansions include a Russian roulette‑style bluff game and a smuggling game similar to Paper, Please. The game uses AI to create and evaluate puzzles, offering constantly new content. It is available at the provided itch.io link.

content: I stopped using Claude Code after a month of heavy use because it was expensive and inefficient. I switched to GenericAgent (GA), which offers lower token costs, better long‑term performance, and powerful native browser controls for web tasks. GA also has a self‑evolving agent architecture that learns from failures, improving speed and usability over time. Its task‑centric memory system performs better than many plug‑in approaches. Though the interface is basic, GA delivers superior functionality and cost‑effectiveness.

title: HackerNews 上一个有趣的 1d chess 谜题，你能找到答案吗
content: One‑dimensional chess is a minimalist variant played on a single row of eight squares. Each side starts with a king, knight, and rook positioned at opposite ends, with the middle two squares empty. The king moves one square horizontally, the knight jumps two squares, and the rook slides any number of squares, all with standard capture rules. The goal is to checkmate the opponent’s king; a draw arises from stalemate, threefold repetition, or insufficient material. The puzzle asks whether white has a forced win under perfect play.

title: 安卓第三方推送，极光免费版有 2 个天坑…
content: Android developers often use third‑party push SDKs to simplify integration. Free versions of popular Chinese services, such as JPush, contain two major limitations. First, free users cannot send push messages through vendor channels; only JPush’s own channel is used. If an app is killed, JPush assumes the device is online, but heartbeats time out, leading to message loss. Second, when sending to vendor channels, only up to 30 % of users receive the push. Paid plans cost about ¥20,000 per year and are not aimed at individual developers. These drawbacks, rarely mentioned in earlier research, should be considered before choosing a push solution.

title: 菲尔兹奖数学家的最新论文：现在的AI缺的不是智力，是"额叶" | 原文
content: David Mumford, a Fields Medal winner, published a paper titled "AI and Human Agency." He argues that current artificial intelligence lacks true agency, not intelligence itself. While large language models can answer questions, write essays, and solve well‑specified problems, they do not genuinely grasp the "real world," hence lacking the “prefrontal cortex”—the creative, decision‑making part of human cognition that enables true agency.

title: 【Deepseek的流形约束】一个 token 从球面滑到单纯形的旅程 | 原文
content: This article revisits the DeepSeek V4 inference process by following a single token through its entire forward pass—from embedding lookup to the 61‑layer Transformer pipeline. It details each dimension change and matrix operation to map the token’s trajectory across layers, highlighting how a token “slides” from one representation space to another within the model. The piece emphasizes the structural flow of data rather than just the arithmetic dimensions.

title: 【一个token的旅程】Deepseek V4预测"中国的首都是"的全流程总复习(2) | 原文
content: The Chinese text explains how the Deepseek V4 language model predicts the next token after “是” in the phrase “中国的首都是”. By using the hidden state of the fifth token, which has processed all preceding tokens through 61 Transformer layers, the model generates a logit vector of 129,280 scores via the language‑model head. These scores represent the probability distribution for the sixth token, enabling the model to choose the most likely continuation.

title: 【一个token的旅程】Deepseek V4预测"中国的首都是"的全流程总复习(1) | 原文
content: The article walks through DeepSeek V4’s full inference pipeline for answering “What is China’s capital?” starting with text tokenization, mapping to token IDs, embedding, processing through 61 Transformer layers, and ending with softmax sampling that outputs “Beijing.” Each step’s dimensionality changes and matrix multiplications are detailed, providing a complete overview of the model’s forward pass.

title: Improving token efficiency in GitHub Agentic Workflows
content: GitHub Agentic Workflows automate repo maintenance but can cost developers due to unseen token usage. To curb this, the team logged token consumption via a unified proxy, producing token‑usage.jsonl artifacts. Daily auditor and optimizer workflows flag inefficient runs and suggest changes such as pruning unused MCP tools and replacing MCP calls with GitHub CLI, reducing context size and removing LLM reasoning overhead. After applying these optimizations, several workflows saw 19–62% effective‑token savings, especially high‑frequency ones like Auto‑Triage Issues.

title: 全力布局 AI，苹果研发支出占营收比例 30 年来首次突破 10%
content: Apple’s research and development spend surpassed 10% of revenue for the first time in over three decades, reaching 10.3% in Q1. The increase outpaces revenue growth, driven by a push into artificial intelligence as CEO Tim Cook prepares to step down. Analysts compare the AI focus to Apple’s earlier iPod effort, noting larger market potential. However, Apple lags in capital expenditures compared to peers and relies on Google partnership, with most funds earmarked for talent acquisition and edge‑AI development. Investors await June’s developer conference and fall releases to see product results.

title: 世界杯转播对中国开价 3 亿美元遭央视拒绝 FIFA 回应

FIFA defended ticket prices as market‑driven, citing U.S. resale laws and fan demand. CCTV argued that China’s team does not qualify, broadcast times are poor for advertisers, and visa issues hinder coverage. With expanding digital viewing options, the controversy highlights tensions between commercial interests and local broadcasting realities.

title: 迄今最大规模古基因组研究：农业革命后，人类进化的速度显著加快 | 原文

The research, led by David Reich’s team at MIT and Broad Institute, found that directional natural selection persisted and intensified over the past 10,000 years, contradicting earlier expectations that human evolution slowed after farming began.

title: Agent pull requests are everywhere. Here’s how to review them.
content: Agent pull requests are proliferating, often bypassing traditional review capacity. They can weaken CI, duplicate existing code, and introduce subtle bugs that pass tests. Reviewers should first let automated checks flag obvious issues, then inspect CI changes, search for duplications, trace a critical logic path, and evaluate security risks in workflow LLM usage. Reject any changes that weaken CI, require justification for new utilities, and ask for clear implementation plans when PRs are large or vague. This focused approach preserves human judgment while managing volume.
